Function.Inference: Bars 1-2 serve as an intro, ending with a repeat sign |: at the end of bar 2.
Bars 3-34 form the main loop body of the track, ending with a :| to repeat.

Section.Inference: A short 2-bar intro setting up the swing feel.
Main 16-bar theme featuring syncopated piano comping over an Eb blues-like progression, ending with a break.
A contrasting 16-bar section consisting of an 8-bar vamp repeated twice with added accents.
